title: Advice For College Freshmen - University Of Tennessee Edition
body: The treadmill machine at a slight incline is so correct! University of Tennessee is so large. Huge college      .       .       .       .       .
author: @wIndstar47

title: Advice For College Freshmen - University Of Tennessee Edition
body: that treadmill shit is no joke. went to UT for 2 years and transferred. them hills ain’t no joke bro
author: @jcoop0008

title: Advice For College Freshmen - University Of Tennessee Edition
body: Worst was freshman year, having lunch at the student center, and then having a class on the third floor of Ayres - in the summer! Absolute killer. After that - the rest was an absolute breeze!
author: @tinamcnalley2575

title: UTC Professors Read Their Rate My Professor Reviews
body: Funny how a few of them while getting negative reviews immediately blamed the students even one that was positive but said they failed anyway. This is much more telling of what to expect than rate my professor.
author: @vagabondwastrel2361

title: UTC Professors Read Their Rate My Professor Reviews
body: Rate my professor literally saves my life so idc what the professors think 😂 if you want students to take your class then be a good teacher 💁🏼‍♀️
author: @selbyhill4905

title: UTC Professors Read Their Rate My Professor Reviews
body:
4:10 A philosophy professor being a philosophy professor.

Jokes aside though, every philosophy professor I've had is either otherworldly amazing, or just super egocentric and annoying. I'm getting the first one from him.
author: @shortclub7011

title: UTC Professors Read Their Rate My Professor Reviews
body: I would not take accounting. Just the way the teacher reacts to the criticism tells me that she neither a good nor a nice teacher.
author: @summer-ht3gk

title: UTC Professors Read Their Rate My Professor Reviews
body: Could y’all even how much we would love school more if Chem & Mathematics & Finance profs had a personality as awesome as basically any philosophy professor lol
author: @comicalastranomical2780

title: UTC Professors Read Their Rate My Professor Reviews
body:
i hate how some professors are just immediately dismissive of any criticism

like we forget they’re people TOO, and despite being well-educated adults, are still prone to deflection like any of us
author: @geoffreygill5849

title: UTC Professors Read Their Rate My Professor Reviews
body: The professor at 0:05 genuinely looks like she’d be a terrible teacher. Like you can tell just by the way she talks and acts
author: @p-51mustang51

title: UTC Professors Read Their Rate My Professor Reviews
body: It’s funny that there’s on professor that got pretty much all good reviews except for one, then took at as valid criticism. And there’s one professor that got all negative feedback, and wrote it all off as slander and disregarded it.
author: @lorenzodemedici6332

title: UTC Professors Read Their Rate My Professor Reviews
body:
Dr Clark sounds awful. The fact that after someone says they tried hard but struggled and didn't get what they were aiming for and yet didn't say one negative thing about her teaching she then has the audacity to blame the student for not trying hard.

Can tell just from that one response that she's a bad teacher.
author: @alexjames7144

title: day in the life at the university of Tennessee!!! 🧡✨🫶
body: Go Vols! I wanted to let you know that you are LOVED by Jesus, and that He sent His Son to die for your sin. He did so, and now we have eternal life through His sacrifice. Have an amazing day!
author: @oliviabarker9733

title: day in the life at the university of Tennessee!!! 🧡✨🫶
body:
Ok… I have a question… there is absolutely no hate…

How do you afford all of this while being in collage girl!! Any tips? 🩷
author: @Emmygrace828

title: MOVE IN VLOG: freshman dorm room tour // the university of tennessee
body: Finally someone in a double who has a lofted bed! Floor space is super important for mental health (if you don't believe me, live in a room for 4 years without much floor space). I don't care if you don't think lofted beds are aesthetically pleasing. You will thank me later.
author: @athenagreen5390

title: MOVE IN VLOG: freshman dorm room tour // the university of tennessee
body: Bingeing these with my 10 year old she loved your video! She is planning a redo on her room soon and this gave her loads of ideas! Love the Deuteronomy verse, Have fun in college ☺️ God Bless 🙏
author: @luladuncanizzy

title: MOVE IN VLOG: freshman dorm room tour // the university of tennessee
body: Love you’re videos 💕 do you have to stay on campus your first year or can you live off campus ?

body: i plan on going to utk and i’m trying to figure out which dorm is which 🥺 could you tell me what dorm this is?

title: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW ABOUT UTK | my experince + advice from a senior about to graduate
body: The Strip used to be the 18+ crowd and Old City was where we all went once everyone was 21+...it's crazy how much UT has changed in just 10 years. Best of luck in your next adventures and GO VOLS
author: @ashleydodd6720

title: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW ABOUT UTK | my experince + advice from a senior about to graduate
body: Hey I go to UT, too! I like it here. What are your plans after graduation? Good luck this semester
author: @tiffanyholland2767

body:

Thank you

title: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW ABOUT UTK | my experince + advice from a senior about to graduate
body: You didn’t mention the absolute harassment from homeless people on the strip when you’re trying to get something to eat.
author: @peterandolph7628

title: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW ABOUT UTK | my experince + advice from a senior about to graduate
body: Your video is fine, but this doesn't really make UT sound like a university where you go to learn anything. Whether that's true or not, I just listened to you talk for 13 minutes about the football team, sororities, ministry groups, places to drink, dorm life.... Like, did you take any classes here or did you drink and watch football games the whole time?
author: @johhnyapplefake4520

title: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW ABOUT UTK | my experince + advice from a senior about to graduate
body:
6:09 you contradict yourself by saying that UT admits too many students. Earlier you said they were being more restrictive.

The “housing crisis” is a failure of capitalism. Which is destroying the college experience for working class and middle class folks.

I was a resident and an RA at Reese hall from 97-99. Reese was awesome. South Carrick was great. This was before hyper capitalist practices ruined the school. And the athletics.
author: @zackamania6534

title: University of Tennessee Campus Tour
body:
Born and raised in Auburn and attended highschool and college at AU. Even worked in the VPs office for a few years.
War Eagle! My Daughter received her Masters degree at AU and now works at UT. UT is much older than AU and I personally like UT MUCH, MUCH better than Auburn. Auburn was GREAT in the 70's and 80's, not at all so great anymore! Anyway, thanks for the video and hope your Daughter is enjoying her time at UT....GO VOLS 🧡
author: @NotYaMomma70sStyle
